description: Mockoon is an API mocking tool for designing and running mock REST APIs locally, in CI, or in hosted cloud deployments. It offers desktop, CLI, and cloud features for creating, sharing, and deploying mock API environments.
summary: Mockoon exposes a local/mock-instance HTTP Admin API, deployable mock HTTP endpoints, and a self-hosting CLI; documented auth includes bearer tokens for the Admin API, cloud instance keys/tokens, and CLI cloud access tokens.

surfaces.name: Mockoon Cloud deployed mock environment HTTP endpoint
